description_long: This nightstand features a modern, minimalist design with clean, straight lines and a warm, medium-brown wood finish. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing lamps, books, or small personal items. The structure is supported by a solid side panel on one end and a recessed vertical panel on the opposite side, creating an open, cantilevered look. There is a single, wide drawer integrated seamlessly beneath the tabletop, with no visible handle, contributing to its sleek appearance. The base is broad and flat, providing stability and a subtle geometric aesthetic. The wood grain pattern is consistent throughout, giving the piece a cohesive and natural look.
description: A modern, minimalist wooden nightstand with a cantilevered design, flat top, and a single seamless drawer. The warm wood finish and clean lines give it a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cantilevered structure, open space beneath the top, and the solid supporting panel on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, handle-less drawer and the symmetrical, flat surfaces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the open space and supporting panel now on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a solid, uninterrupted wood panel with no visible openings or features.
attribute_leg_design: solid side panel and recessed vertical support, no distinct legs
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
